name: animata-sibling-focus-nav
title: Sibling Focus Nav
author: Animata
description: Dims or blurs sibling links while one navigation item is hovered or keyboard-focused.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied source resolves its bundled support file both in this source batch and at its registry target.
Removed unrelated absoluteUrl, lerp, and getDistance exports; retained the upstream cn helper required by this item.

modifications.change: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils.
modifications.reason: Resolve the bundled upstream utility from both the source batch and installation target without relying on a consumer root alias.

modifications.change: Removed the unrelated absoluteUrl, lerp, and getDistance exports.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied support closure limited to the upstream cn export used by these components.
